code: import{API_BASE_URL}from'./config';async function parseResponse(response){const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.error||'Request failed');}return data;}export async function loginUser(credentials){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/login`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(credentials)});return parseResponse(response);}export async function registerUser(credentials){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/register`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(credentials)});return parseResponse(response);}
